publishedAbstract: - Compliance scan stuck in `ERROR` state due to volume mount issue. ~~~ # oc get scan-n openshift-compliance NAME PHASE RESULT rhcos4-moderate-rev-4-master DONE ERROR rhcos4-moderate-rev-4-worker DONE ERROR ~~~ ~~~ 28s         Warning   FailedMount              pod/rhcos4-moderate-rev-4-master-rs-79d966c8b9-vr5tl        MountVolume.MountDevice failed for volume "pvc-43538a56-538e-4af3-9ce1-d6ef18d4bdef": kubernetes.io/csi: attacher.MountDevice failed to create newCsiDriverClient: driver name openshift-storage.cephfs.csi.ceph.com not found in the list of registered CSI drivers ~~~
publishedTitle: Compliance scan in error state due to Mount failure error.
